name: eu-ai-act-compliance-checker
title: EU AI Act Compliance Checker
description: First-pass audit of an AI deployment (voice agent, chatbot, generated content, deepfake, biometric system) against EU Regulation 2024/1689 — the AI Act. Catches the top 12 violations most likely to bite SMBs across Articles 5 (prohibited practices), 50 (transparency), and 53 (GPAI obligations). Accepts input in EN/LV/LT/ET/RU.
